subcodes.first_line: O steadfast handmaiden of God! Thy letter was received, together with the letters that were enclosed therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله الثابته نامه شما رسید با نامه هاایکه در طی نامه شما بود ازین جهت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @consolation and comfort
